items.name: Dragon Tail - Scales of the Dread - Red and Black
items.description:
BLACK VERSION: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/71521304122084/Dragon-Tail-Scales-of-the-Dread-Black

Realistic red and black medieval Dragon monster tail. Based on a certain dragon "the Dread" from "Elden".
Can fit with alternative styles like goth, emo and more due to that black color being able to fit with many things!
It is also perfect for monster, animal or scalie like avatars. 

Embrace the dragon!
Check out our group for more.
